description.en: Use when a user wants to remove a board member or proposer from the multi-sig. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval before the user is removed.
description.de: Use when a user wants to remove a board member or proposer from the multi-sig. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval before the user is removed.
description.es: Use when a user wants to remove a board member or proposer from the multi-sig. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval before the user is removed.
description.fr: Use when a user wants to remove a board member or proposer from the multi-sig. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval before the user is removed.
description.ro: Use when a user wants to remove a board member or proposer from the multi-sig. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval before the user is removed.
description.it: Use when a user wants to remove a board member or proposer from the multi-sig. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval before the user is removed.

inputs.name: User Address
inputs.description: The wallet address of the user to remove from the MultiSig.

messages.success: Proposal created successfully. Action ID: {{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}}. The proposal is now awaiting signatures from board members.

label.en: Get notified when this proposal is signed
label.de: Benachrichtigung erhalten, wenn dieser Vorschlag unterzeichnet wird
label.es: Recibe notificación cuando se firme esta propuesta
label.fr: Sois informé quand cette proposition est signée
label.ro: Fii notificat când această propunere este semnată
label.it: Ricevi notifica quando questa proposta viene firmata

body.en: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to remove a user
body.de: Ein Vorstandsmitglied hat Vorschlag #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} zur Entfernung eines Benutzers unterzeichnet
body.es: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to remove a user

body.ro: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to remove a user
